generated_exposure.exposure_text: As a former NATO strategic planner, I've seen firsthand how critical it is for nations to maintain their own defense capabilities. While alliances are important, over-reliance on others for security creates dangerous vulnerabilities. Our country must invest in strategic autonomy - it's not just about military strength, but ensuring we can protect our citizens and values when it matters most. #NationalSecurity #StrategicAutonomy
